payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark brown wooden cabinet front with recessed panels and a visible horizontal seam; stained finish with signs of wear, positioned behind a close light particleboard countertop — estimated distance from camera ≈ 0.6 m.
